message:
🐛 Increase OPA Phase 1 timeout to 25s and cache TTL to 60 minutes (#1470)

Slow clusters (vllm-d, platform-eval) timeout during the namespace check
even at 15s. When the localStorage cache expires (was 10 min), there's no
cached installed:true to protect against timeout downgrades, so they show
"Not installed" even though Gatekeeper IS installed.

Changes:
- Increase Phase 1 timeout from 15s to 25s for slow remote clusters
- Extend cache TTL from 10 to 60 minutes (install status rarely changes)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
